<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The next cell in front of me at row 02 column C is lava (`L`), which is deadly. I must avoid moving forward. To safely navigate toward the goal at row 04 column D, I should turn downwards by turning right twice or turn left once and continue. Turning right once will face me down, which leads toward the goal, so I will TURN_RIGHT.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD

<action>

First, I'll turn right once.
